name: Track Group, Inc.
business: Track Group designs, manufactures, and markets location tracking devices and develops and sells related software, services, and monitoring applications. The company sells to government customers on federal, state, and local levels in the U.S. and to Ministries of Justice internationally. It primarily generates recurring revenue through long-term contracts for device-agnostic subscription services.
sellsTo: Government customers (federal, state, local) in U.S.

exposures.sentence: Our products and services include a full-range of one-piece GPS tracking devices, a device-agnostic operating system, a portfolio of software applications including smartphone, alcohol and predictive analytics, and a variety of accessory, service and support offerings.
